metadata.title: RehabFrame
metadata.description: Video-based rehabilitation progress reviews for therapy teams.

sidebar.subtitle: Video progress workspace
sidebar.mvpNote: MVP mode: raw videos stay in the browser and only the extracted movement metrics are saved.
sidebar.emptyHistory: Your saved analyses will appear here after the first comparison.

header.subtitle: Therapeutic physical education review
header.title: Upload two videos and get a structured movement comparison.
header.disclaimer: Automated summary only · not a diagnosis

landing.headline: This prototype compares a baseline clip against a follow-up clip and turns it into a readable report.
landing.description: The browser samples key frames with MoveNet, scores symmetry, stability, motion range, and tracking quality, then saves the generated report in the history sidebar.

measures.symmetry: Symmetry between left and right joint angles.
measures.stability: Hip-center stability while the movement unfolds.
measures.kneeFlexion: Knee flexion range as a simple range-of-motion proxy.
measures.tracking: Tracking confidence so low-quality recordings are flagged.

dropzone.fileTypes: MP4, WebM, or MOV. Keep the full body inside the frame.
dropzone.clickToChoose: Click to choose a local file

bottomBar.initialStatus: Choose a baseline clip and a follow-up clip to generate a movement report.
bottomBar.analysisComplete: Analysis complete. The new report is now pinned in history.
bottomBar.errorBothVideos: Select both videos before starting the analysis.
bottomBar.errorServerSave: The server could not save the generated analysis.
bottomBar.errorAnalysis: The analysis could not be completed.
